data.text/markdown:
Interactive 8D Parallel Plot for CoCrFeNi Gibbs Free Energy

This marimo notebook is a webapp-style version of the original Streamlit script. It automatically loads csv_files/Gibbs_<T>K.csv, builds the 8D parallel plot, and updates when you change the controls.
